# Implementation Plan: Website Development & UI Updates

**Branch**: `001-site-ui-updates` | **Date**: 2026-03-10 | **Spec**: [spec.md](./spec.md)
**Input**: Feature specification from `/specs/001-site-ui-updates/spec.md`

**Note**: This plan was generated by the `/speckit.plan` command.

## Summary

This feature delivers four UI/UX improvements to the Taste of Cinema Arabic WordPress theme:
1. **Smart Sticky Header** — Direction-aware header that hides on scroll-down and reveals on scroll-up using CSS transforms and a lightweight JS scroll listener.
2. **Thumbnail Enhancement** — CSS-only visual polish (shadows, borders, hover effects) applied to all post card templates.
3. **ReCaptcha Removal** — Complete deletion of all reCAPTCHA code (3 PHP classes, 1 JS file, 1 test file), database options cleanup, and contact form code update.
4. **Homepage Modularization** — Refactor front-page.php into 5 toggleable, priority-ordered sections managed via the WordPress Customizer API.

## Technical Context

**Language/Version**: PHP 8.0+ (strict_types), JavaScript ES6+
**Primary Dependencies**: WordPress 6.x, TailwindCSS 3.4, jQuery (bundled with WP)
**Storage**: WordPress `wp_options` table (Customizer theme_mods)
**Testing**: Manual browser testing, PHP lint, Lighthouse audit, grep verification
**Target Platform**: Linux server (Nginx), all modern browsers + mobile
**Project Type**: WordPress custom theme
**Performance Goals**: CLS ≤ 0.1, header transition ≤ 300ms, hover effects ≤ 400ms
**Constraints**: RTL layout (Arabic), dark mode support, no additional plugin dependencies
**Scale/Scope**: 5 homepage sections, ~10 files modified, ~6 files deleted, ~8 files created

## Constitution Check

*GATE: Must pass before Phase 0 research. Re-check after Phase 1 design.*

| Principle | Status | Notes |
|-----------|--------|-------|
| Quality | ✅ Pass | CSS-first approach for thumbnails; GPU-accelerated transforms for header; Customizer API for homepage |
| Maintainability | ✅ Pass | Modular template parts; self-contained sections; clean code removal |
| Reliability & Security | ✅ Pass | Existing spam protections retained (honeypot, rate limit, nonce); reCAPTCHA secrets cleaned from DB |
| Clear Architecture | ✅ Pass | Follows established theme patterns (Customizer for settings, template-parts for UI) |
| Editorial Integrity | ✅ Pass | Visual enhancements reinforce cinematic brand; homepage sections are content-focused |
| Testing | ✅ Pass | PHP lint, browser testing, grep verification, Lighthouse audit planned |
| Breaking Changes | ✅ Pass | reCAPTCHA removal is documented; homepage modularization maintains existing visual layout as default |

No violations. Complexity tracking table not needed.

## Project Structure

### Documentation (this feature)

```text
specs/001-site-ui-updates/
├── plan.md              # This file
├── spec.md              # Feature specification
├── research.md          # Phase 0 research output
├── data-model.md        # Phase 1 data model
├── quickstart.md        # Phase 1 quickstart guide
└── checklists/
    └── requirements.md  # Spec quality checklist
```

### Source Code (repository root)

```text
# Files to CREATE
inc/homepage-customizer.php               # Customizer registrations for homepage sections
template-parts/homepage/section-hero.php      # Hero carousel section (extracted from front-page.php)
template-parts/homepage/section-articles.php  # Articles grid section (extracted from front-page.php)
template-parts/homepage/section-categories.php # Category highlights section (new)
template-parts/homepage/section-banner.php     # Promotional banner section (new)
template-parts/homepage/section-sidebar.php    # Sidebar wrapper section

# Files to MODIFY
header.php                      # Add scroll-state data attributes for smart sticky
assets/js/app.js                # Add scroll direction detection + header state management
assets/css/src/style.css        # Add header transitions + thumbnail effects + homepage section styles
functions.php                   # Remove reCAPTCHA requires, add homepage-customizer require
inc/contact-form.php            # Remove reCAPTCHA verification block
front-page.php                  # Refactor to dynamic section rendering loop

# Files to DELETE
inc/recaptcha/class-recaptcha-admin.php     # reCAPTCHA admin settings
inc/recaptcha/class-recaptcha-hooks.php     # reCAPTCHA script hooks
inc/recaptcha/class-recaptcha-verify.php    # reCAPTCHA token verification
inc/recaptcha/                              # Empty directory after file removal
assets/js/recaptcha-handler.js              # Client-side reCAPTCHA handler
test-recaptcha-settings.php                 # Test file at theme root
```

**Structure Decision**: WordPress theme structure with `inc/` for PHP includes, `template-parts/` for reusable templates, and `assets/` for CSS/JS. New `template-parts/homepage/` directory for modular homepage sections follows the existing `template-parts/content/` pattern.

## Phase Implementation Overview

### Phase 1: ReCaptcha Removal (Low Risk, Foundation)
Remove reCAPTCHA code, clean database options, update contact form. This is the simplest change with the most clearly bounded scope.

### Phase 2: Thumbnail Enhancement (Low Risk, Visual)
Add CSS-only visual effects to card templates. No PHP changes; purely additive CSS.

### Phase 3: Sticky Header (Medium Risk, Interactive)
Implement smart sticky header with JS scroll detection and CSS transitions. Depends on understanding the header's z-index and layout context.

### Phase 4: Homepage Modularization (High Complexity, Structural)
Refactor front-page.php, create Customizer settings, build section template parts. Largest scope with the most files created.

### Phase 5: Integration Testing & Polish
Cross-feature testing, Lighthouse audit, edge case verification, CSS build finalization.
